Murf AI Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI voiceover platform aimed at presentations, e-learning, and marketing videos.

MakerMurf
CategoryAI Voice & Audio Tools
PricingFree plan available; paid plans from $19/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Murf AI →

Best for

E-learning and corporate video voiceovers.

Pros

  • Easy-to-use studio for syncing voice to video/slides
  • Wide voice and language library
  • Good for corporate and e-learning content

Cons

  • Voices slightly less natural than ElevenLabs on emotional delivery
  • Free tier limited to short watermark-free exports

Alternatives to Murf AI

ElevenLabs

AI text-to-speech and voice cloning known for highly realistic voices.

Otter.ai

AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items.
